input: user historical interaction sequences (item sequences, possibly with attributes)
output: ranked list of items for next interaction
backbone: knowledge-augmented GRU + collaborative item aggregation + bitwise gating
key_idea: augment GRU with knowledge graph attributes for short-term interest, aggregate collaborative item relations for co-occurrence, and use bitwise gating for long-term interest
datasets: three real-world datasets (not named in abstract)
